expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜子板材的尺寸。[Width], [Height], [Depth] 表示总尺寸，[BoardThick] 表示顶板、底板及侧板的板材厚度，[BackBoardThick] 表示背板的板材厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดของแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดรวม, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของแผ่นไม้บน, ล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของแผ่นไม้ด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu bảng trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu bảng nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang sukat, [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng Pang-itaas, Ibaba at Gilid na Board, [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng Background Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကားဂုံးအရွယ်အစားကိုတွက်ချက်ပါ။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာမှု၊ [BoardThick] သည်ထိပ်ဖုံး၊ အောက်ဖုံးနှင့်ဘေးဖုံးပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်ပြီး [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ဖုံးပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាអង្កត់ផ្ចិតក្តារសម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជាវិមាត្រសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់សម្ភារៈបន្ទះខាងលើ ខាងក្រោមនិងចំហៀង, [BackBoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់សម្ភារៈបន្ទះខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະໜາດຂອງແຜ່ນສໍາລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນຂະໜາດທັງຫມົດ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມຫນາຂອງວັດສະດຸແຜ່ນຂ້າງເທິງ, ຂ້າງລຸ່ມ ແລະຂ້າງຂ້າງ, [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມຫນາຂອງວັດສະດຸແຜ່ນຫຼັງ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットのボードサイズを計算します。[Width], [Height], [Depth]は全体の寸法、[BoardThick]は上部、下部、側面ボードの素材の厚さ、[BackBoardThick]は背景ボードの素材の厚さです。 (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 판재 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 치수이고, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 판재의 두께, [BackBoardThick]는 뒷판 판재의 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] es la medida total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de las tablas superiores, inferiores y laterales, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les tailles de planches pour une armoire. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les mesures totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieure, inférieure et latérales, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ist die Gesamtgröße, [BoardThick] ist die Dicke des Materials der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platte, [BackBoardThick] ist die Dicke des Materialien der Rückwand. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, निचले और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पृष्ठभूमि बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] являются общими размерами, [BoardThick] — это толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковых досок, [BackBoardThick] — это толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
